title: Headers or "Subgrouping"

posts.author: laurak (Laura Komenda)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be very beneficial for me to have Headers which allow groups to be nested under a specific topic (that could then be collapsed) or potentially the option for a main group, with subgroups.

For example
Dashboard on Movies

HEADER or MAIN GROUP: Disney Movies
Group 1: Mulan
Group 2: Beauty and the Beast
Group 3: Moana

HEADER or MAIN GROUP: Harry Potter Movies
Group 1: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer’s Stone
Group 2: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
Group 3: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

Additionally, the ability to add a description to groups and “headers” would be very beneficial.

Imagine that there are many tasks under each group within each Header or Main Group. I do not have a workaround because I could not think of one. I’m open to workaround suggestions!

posts.author: SamChristophers (Sam Christophers)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am fairly certain I have previously seen that MONDAY are working on ‘Sub-tasks’, but unsure.

Really like the idea of having a description on the groups/headers. This would be particularly useful when information relates to the project / group as a whole as opposed to individual aspects. I have also found MONDAYs description a little limited

posts.author: laurak (Laura Komenda)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for your comment, @SamChristophers! I did see that ‘sub-tasks’ is something the MONDAY team is looking at, and I actually need that in addition to the header/sub-grouping functionality. Taking it back to my original example, sub-tasks would be sequels/related movies.

posts.author: TamaraLove (Tamara Love)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 vote for group descriptions - would be super valuable!

posts.author: Admeirel (Adolpho Meirelles)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please!! Super valuable feature!
@CSG @CXS

posts.author: jasonwiberg (Jason Wiberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is a really great way to organize items and tasks. Whether it is called “Headers” or introduce the idea of “Sub-Groups”, this can help make complex boards more simple.

I use this same concept in other workflow management software, as well as Pivot Tables in Excel. My vote is in!

posts.author: becca_colesoft (Becca C)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed! The ability to group items by more than one layer of groupings would take functionality provided with the sorting feature and make it so much more useful! Please add sub-group functionality!
